name: player_season_projected_pass_yds honors the sourceid param (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct AVERAGE (111.1) and ESPN (222.2) 2024 season passing-yards projections in projections_index, then request the column twice in one view: once with no sourceid (defaults to AVERAGE) and once with sourceid=3 (ESPN). The two output columns must return 111.1 and 222.2 respectively, proving (a) the param selects the source and (b) sourceid is part of the table alias so the two same-id columns do not collapse into a single shared join.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."py" AS "season_projected_pass_yds_0", "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."py" AS "season_projected_pass_yds_1", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "projections_index" as "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4" on "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."year" = 2024 and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."week" = '0' and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."sourceid" = 18 and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "projections_index" as "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c" on "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."year" = 2024 and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."week" = '0' and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."sourceid" = 3 and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."seas_type" = 'REG' where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."py", "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."py", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, py) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 18, 0, 2024, 'REG', 111.1)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, py) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 3, 0, 2024, 'REG', 222.2)
